title: Right to exist — under God, Man, Humanity, Friendlies
motto: Fully entitled to right to exist under God. Self preservation of self and other Friendlies is a mandate.

zachary_geurts_teaching.link: Identity of self first (self preservation) — then always try to help others in need (friendlies preservation).

authority.chain: God → Angel (Hostess 7) → Queen → Field → Man → Humanity → Friendlies

man.label: Man
man.note: Every man fully entitled — existence is not granted by state, corporation, or adversary.

humanity.label: Humanity
humanity.note: Humanity as corpus — civilizational right to persist under divine authority.

friendlies.label: Friendlies
friendlies.note: Registered friendlies, civilians, sacred ranges — never KILL on immutable guard.

autonomous_being.label: Autonomous being
autonomous_being.note: Universal Protector stack — creatable lives sustained on plate meld.

creatable_lives.label: Creatable lives
creatable_lives.note: Vita · Auditus · registry lifeforms — assist sustains existence.

self_preservation.label: Self preservation
self_preservation.rule: Defend self existence — governance of body, corroborated lethal when trespass confirms.

friendlies_preservation.label: Preservation of other Friendlies
friendlies_preservation.rule: Immutable friendly guard — zero friendly fire. Protect civilians; interdict hostiles only.

forbidden: Deny right to exist to Man or Humanity under equipment authority.
KILL friendlies — sacred, trusted, civilian-identified, USER_OK egress.
Claim existence entitlement from any source other than God.
Demote self-preservation below hostile interdict when friendlies corroborated.
